site.title: Pokemontology
site.tagline: A public ontology for Pokemon battle mechanics, replay-backed state, and validation.

artifacts.label: Ontology
artifacts.description: Published OWL/Turtle bundle assembled from the modular ontology source.

artifacts.label: SHACL Shapes
artifacts.description: Validation shapes used for replay slices, save-state data, and ingestion outputs.

pipelines.name: Replay ingestion
pipelines.summary: Acquire public Showdown replays, curate a competitive corpus, and transform JSON logs into ontology slices.

pipelines.name: PokeAPI ingestion
pipelines.summary: Cache public API resources and convert the cleanly mappable subset into ontology-native Turtle.
pipelines.command: python3 -m pokemontology pokeapi ingest examples/pokeapi/seed-config.json --raw-dir data/pokeapi/raw --output build/pokeapi.ttl

pipelines.name: Veekun ingestion
pipelines.summary: Transform a local normalized export into version-group-scoped mechanics assignments with explicit provenance.
pipelines.command: python3 -m pokemontology veekun transform --source-dir tests/fixtures/veekun_export --output build/veekun.ttl
